modules.sql: SELECT CAST(c.id AS INTEGER) AS customer_id, COALESCE(c.first_name, '') AS first_name, COALESCE(c.last_name, '') AS last_name, COALESCE(ce.event_count, 0) AS compliance_events, COALESCE(wt.wire_count, 0) AS wire_count, 0 AS high_txn_count, ROUND((COALESCE(ce.event_count, 0) * 30.0) + (COALESCE(wt.wire_count, 0) * 20.0) + (0 * 10.0), 2) AS risk_score, c.ifw_effective_date FROM customers c LEFT JOIN (SELECT customer_id, COUNT(*) AS event_count FROM compliance_events GROUP BY customer_id) ce ON c.id = ce.customer_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT customer_id, COUNT(*) AS wire_count FROM wire_transfers GROUP BY customer_id) wt ON c.id = wt.customer_id
